entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH IN EFFECT UNTIL 1 AM CDT SUNDAY

entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY AFTER MIDNIGHT
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL THIS EVENING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS AROUND 70

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
